mapper.insert: INSERT INTO calendar(calendarno, memberno, adminno, title, schedule_date, schedule_time, category, description, alarm_yn, rdate, favorite_yn) VALUES(calendar_seq.nextval, #{memberno}, #{adminno}, #{title}, #{schedule_date}, #{schedule_time}, #{category}, #{description}, #{alarm_yn}, sysdate, #{favorite_yn})
mapper.select: SELECT calendarno, memberno, adminno, title, schedule_date, schedule_time, category, description, alarm_yn, rdate, favorite_yn FROM calendar ORDER BY schedule_date ASC, schedule_time ASC
SELECT calendarno, memberno, adminno, title, schedule_date, schedule_time, category, description, alarm_yn, rdate, favorite_yn FROM calendar WHERE calendarno = #{calendarno}
mapper.update: UPDATE calendar SET title = #{title}, schedule_date = #{schedule_date}, schedule_time = #{schedule_time}, category = #{category}, description = #{description}, alarm_yn = #{alarm_yn}, favorite_yn = #{favorite_yn}, rdate=sysdate WHERE calendarno = #{calendarno}
